name: Peanut Butter Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together until combined.
2. Slowly add water to the peanut butter and blend until smooth. Stir in the egg yolks.
3. Add the gelatin mixture and cool until it thickens slightly.
4. Stir in vanilla and chill until partially set.
5. Beat the egg whites to soft peaks, then gradually add 2 tablespoons sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
6. Fold the beaten egg whites into the first mixture.
7. Whip the cream until stiff and fold into the pie mixture.
8. Slice the banana (if desired) into the pastry shell and top with the filling.
9. Garnish with globs of whipped cream, each topped with a slice of banana.
